bizcity_crm_events.purpose: Unified events table — CRM meetings, internal/workshop/training calendar entries, and channel-gateway fb_post schedule rows. Reminder cron + Google Calendar 2-way sync.

updated_at.type: DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

contact_id.comment: FK bizcity_crm_contacts.id — contact who originated/owns this event. NULL until CRM_Inbox_Bridge or scheduler manager resolves identity.

conversation_id.comment: FK bizcity_crm_conversations.id — CRM conversation linked to this event. NULL for non-CRM events (fb_post, web_post, etc.).

campaign_id.comment: FK bizcity_crm_campaigns.id — campaign that generated this event (broadcast_scheduled, qr_scan_followup). NULL for user-created events.

history.change: Unify CRM + scheduler tables → bizcity_crm_events with event_type + metadata + google_account_id (PHASE-0.28 unify-scheduler).

Document contract: event_type='fb_post' (channel-gateway) reuses metadata JSON column for fb_page_id, fb_page_name, fb_content, fb_image_url, fb_publish_status (pending|publishing|published|failed|cancelled), fb_post_id, fb_permalink, fb_error. No schema delta — pure contract addition. See core/channel-gateway/PHASE-CG-SCHEDULER.md v0.2.

Contract addition: event_type='web_post' (channel-gateway Web Post Publisher) reuses metadata JSON column for web_title, web_content, web_excerpt, web_status (publish|draft|pending|future|private), web_category_ids[], web_tag_names[], web_image_url, web_notebook_id, web_skeleton_version, web_publish_status (pending|publishing|published|failed|cancelled), web_post_id, web_permalink, web_edit_link, web_error. No schema delta. Handler: core/channel-gateway/includes/class-web-post-publisher.php (priority 25). Cron events: web_publish_attempt/ok/failed + web_image_sideload_failed (R-CRON-META). Also documents event_type='reminder_zalo' reservation (channel-gateway Zalo Reminder, ships next slice) using metadata zalo_bot_id, zalo_user_id, zalo_text, zalo_reminder_status.

Formalize event_type='reminder_zalo' contract (TASK-UNIFY Phase 2): metadata fields zalo_bot_id (BIGINT), zalo_user_id (VARCHAR 64), zalo_text (TEXT), zalo_reminder_status (pending|sending|sent|failed). Handler: core/channel-gateway/includes/class-zalo-reminder.php (priority 30). Cron events: zalo_reminder_send_attempt/ok/failed (R-CRON-META). Formalize 'draft' as valid status value (alongside active|cancelled|done) for admin command HIL flow: event created as status='draft' by CG Admin Router, flipped to status='active' on admin confirm, cron claim_due_reminders skips draft rows (no schema delta — guard already present in WHERE status='active' clause).

TASK-UNIFY Phase 3 — Legacy migration matrix. Register four new event_types (no schema delta — reuse metadata JSON column): event_type='woo_product_create' handler class-woo-product-handler.php (priority 35), metadata: woo_product_name, woo_product_price, woo_product_sale_price, woo_product_description, woo_product_image_url, woo_product_category, woo_chat_id, woo_product_status (pending|creating|created|failed); event_type='woo_product_edit' (same handler, priority 35), metadata: woo_product_identity, woo_product_updates (JSON obj), woo_chat_id, woo_product_edit_status (pending|updating|updated|failed); event_type='woo_order_create' handler class-woo-order-handler.php (priority 40), metadata: woo_order_user_input, woo_chat_id, woo_order_status (pending|creating|created|failed); event_type='lead_report' handler class-lead-report-handler.php (priority 38), metadata: lead_report_type (daily|weekly|monthly), lead_report_days, lead_report_months, lead_report_month, lead_report_year, lead_report_chat_id, lead_report_status (pending|generating|done|failed). Cron events per handler: *_attempt/*_ok/*_failed (R-CRON-META). Legacy wrappers: biz_create_task() -> reminder_zalo, biz_create_content() -> web_post, biz_create_product() -> woo_product_create, biz_create_order() -> woo_order_create. Deprecated: twf_handle_facebook_multi_page_post().

AUTOMATION BE-4 — Register event_type='automation_workflow' (no schema delta — reuse metadata JSON column). Handler: core/automation/includes/class-automation-trigger-matcher.php::on_scheduler_fire() at priority 45. Metadata contract: { workflow_id: int (required, FK bizcity_automation_workflows.id), payload: object (optional, free-form data merged into runner ctx.trigger), defer: bool (reserved, currently always sync inside cron context). Idempotency: matcher only fires when event.status='active'; scheduler-cron flips reminder_sent=1 after dispatch (existing logic). UI flow: user opens wp-admin/admin.php?page=bizcity-scheduler → New Event → set title='Run workflow X' + event_type='automation_workflow' + metadata={workflow_id:N,payload:{...}} + start_at → scheduler cron tick at reminder time → do_action('bizcity_scheduler_reminder_fire',event) → matcher dispatches → BizCity_Automation_Repo_Runs::enqueue() + BizCity_Automation_Runner::execute(). Runner emits result row back to bizcity_crm_events with event_type='automation_run' (CRM bridge from BE-3).

PHASE-SCHEDULER-NERVE-CENTER W1 — Contract-only addition (no schema delta): metadata JSON column extended with three reserved blocks + one new event_type. (1) metadata.inbound { platform: ZALO|FACEBOOK|TELEGRAM|WEBCHAT|TWINBRAIN|ADMIN, chat_id: string, user_id: string|int, account_id: int, character_id: int, message_id: string, captured_at: ISO8601, raw_text: string, intent_tag: fb_post|reminder|todo|note } — written by channel router / TwinBrain tools / automation matcher at event create time when event originates from inbound surface; consumed by BizCity_Scheduler_Completion_Notifier for reply-back routing. (2) metadata.delivery { status: pending|sent|failed, platform: string, chat_id: string, sent_at: mysql datetime, message_id: string|null, error: string|null } — written by Completion Notifier after reply attempt for audit + retry. (3) metadata.notify { enabled: bool (default true), target: { platform, chat_id }|null (per-event override), template: string|null (optional message override) } — user-facing notify preference per event. (4) metadata.hil { pending: bool, expires_at: ISO8601, timeout: bool, last_envelope_msg_id: string|null } — written by BizCity_Scheduler_HIL_Router for reminder_personal HIL flow (companion doc PHASE-SCHEDULER-HIL-CONFIRM.md). New event_type='reminder_personal' registered (TwinBrain master tool scheduler_set_reminder); reuses metadata reminder_text, reminder_repeat (none|daily|weekly|monthly), reminder_advance_min. All blocks optional; absence = no inbound provenance / no delivery attempted / default site-wide notify channel. New site option 'bizcity_default_notify_channel' { platform, chat_id } + user_meta 'bizcity_default_notify_channel' for D3 fallback resolution. See core/scheduler/docs/PHASE-SCHEDULER-AS-NERVE-CENTER.md §2 + §3 + §8.

SCH-NC W10 — Inbound provenance backfill (no schema delta). Replace deleted CLI script tools/migrations/2026-06-03-backfill-inbound.php with diagnostics-driven probe `core.scheduler.inbound_backfill` (id stable, severity=warning, order=51) reporting 6 cases as steps: ai_plan, workflow, twinbrain, crm_calendar, orphan_type, corrupt_meta. Each case has 1 Site Provisioner installer registered via bizcity_register_installers (id `scheduler_backfill_inbound__<case>`) + 1 aggregate `scheduler_backfill_inbound__all`. Repair logic in BizCity_Scheduler_Inbound_Backfiller::apply($case) — idempotent, preserves existing metadata blocks, synthesizes inbound{platform=TWINBRAIN, user_id, captured_at=created_at, raw_text=ai_context, intent_tag=event_type|case_intent} + sets _backfilled=true, _case=<id>, _source=<legacy source> for audit. Probe per-case fix_hint emits ?bizcity_run_installer URL with nonce so operator clicks 🔧 Fix in tools.php?page=bizcity-diagnostics.

SCH-BC W1-W5 — Contract addition (no schema delta): BizCity_Scheduler_Inbound_Backfiller adds 3-tier cache to eliminate the 17× duplicate SELECT bursts observed via Query Monitor (caller chain Site_Provisioner::maybe_self_heal → run_all → apply). L0 in-request memoization (static $memo_scan/$memo_apply keyed by days+limit+case). L1 wp_cache group `bizcity_sched_backfill` TTL 300s around scan() COUNT loop (degrades to L0 when no persistent object cache). L2 per-case version-opt gate option `bizcity_scheduler_backfill_done_<case>`='1' set when apply() finds zero remaining rows OR finishes with failed=0; Site_Provisioner installer `scheduler_backfill_inbound__<case>` declares version_opt + expected_ver='1' to opt into the gate so subsequent self-heal cycles skip the SELECT entirely. Invalidation listeners (init in bootstrap): bizcity_scheduler_event_created/updated/deleted → invalidate_all() (delete all 6 done-opts + wp_cache_delete scan key + reset static memo); bizcity_run_installer_done filtered for `scheduler_backfill_inbound__*` → invalidate_all() (fix-button click triggers fresh scan next time). Aggregate installer `scheduler_backfill_inbound__all` intentionally has NO version-gate (manual escape-hatch). Race fix in BizCity_Site_Provisioner::maybe_self_heal: set_transient(SELF_HEAL_TRANS) BEFORE run_all() to dedupe concurrent admin_init bursts (with try/catch+delete_transient on throw); applies to all installers, not just scheduler. New hook fired by Site_Provisioner::run_one(): do_action('bizcity_run_installer_done', $id, $row) after callback completes. See core/scheduler/docs/PHASE-SCHEDULER-BACKFILL-CACHE.md.

R-UNIFY Wave 2 — ADD 3 FK columns to bizcity_crm_events for Omni-Channel Unification. (1) contact_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL — FK bizcity_crm_contacts.id; populated by CRM_Inbox_Bridge when event originates from an inbound customer message, or by scheduler_manager when contact is known. (2) conversation_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL — FK bizcity_crm_conversations.id; links events to the CRM inbox thread. (3) campaign_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL — FK bizcity_crm_campaigns.id; set when event_type IN (broadcast_scheduled, qr_scan_followup) so funnel analytics can count touches per campaign. ADD INDEX idx_contact_id (contact_id), ADD INDEX idx_campaign_id (campaign_id). New event_types registered in class-scheduler-manager.php::sanitize_row(): broadcast_scheduled (R-UNIFY Wave 6 placeholder), crm_conversation_task (inline task created from CRM inbox), qr_scan_followup (QR code scan entry point). Migration: migrate_to_4() ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN × 3 + ADD KEY × 2 — ADD-only, handled by BizCity_Scheduler_Manager (SCHEMA_VERSION bumped 3→4). See docs/architecture/OMNI-CHANNEL-UNIFIED-CORE.md.
